title: Create transportation booking system with OTP verification and distance-based pricing

requirements.summary: Create booking flow interface with OTP input form for trip verification
acceptanceCriteria: UI displays OTP input field after booking request
Displays success or error message based on verification result

file_operations.description: Create OTP verification form component that displays a 6-digit numeric input field, handles user input with validation, shows loading state during verification, calls the backend verifyOTP method, and displays success or error messages based on the verification result

Create booking flow page that orchestrates the trip booking process, calls backend startBooking to generate OTP, displays the OTPVerificationForm component when OTP is generated, and manages the booking state transitions between initial request, OTP verification, and confirmation states
Wire the BookingFlow page into the application router by adding a route for /booking and updating navigation to include access to the booking flow from the main interface

requirements.summary: Build trip details input form capturing distance and time information
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes fields for distance traveled (in kilometers)
Form includes fields for time taken (start and end time or duration)
Input validation ensures positive numbers for distance and time
Form submits data to backend for cost calculation

file_operations.description: Create trip details form component with input fields for distance traveled in kilometers and time taken in minutes, implement validation to ensure positive numeric values, and submit data to backend getCost method for price calculation
Integrate TripDetailsForm component into the booking flow after successful OTP verification, manage form submission state, and handle the transition to cost display after trip details are submitted

requirements.summary: Create cost display component showing price breakdown including distance charges, time charges, and total fare
acceptanceCriteria: Shows base fare, distance-based charges, and time-based charges separately
Updates dynamically when trip details change

file_operations.description: Create cost breakdown component that displays itemized pricing information including base fare, distance-based charges calculated from kilometers, time-based charges calculated from minutes, and total trip cost prominently, receiving cost data from the backend getCost response

Integrate CostBreakdown component to display after trip details are submitted and cost is calculated, passing the calculated cost data and trip details to the component for rendering the price breakdown

requirements.summary: Design a clean, modern visual theme with transportation-focused aesthetics using warm earth tones and clear typography that emphasizes usability for travel booking interfaces
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent color palette throughout the application
Typography is clear and legible for form inputs and pricing information
Layout feels intuitive for booking and verification workflows
Visual style reflects transportation and travel context

file_operations.description: Update global CSS with a warm earth tone color palette suitable for transportation contexts, including primary colors like terracotta, amber, and warm grays, and define typography styles that ensure clear legibility for form inputs and pricing information

Extend Tailwind configuration with custom color tokens reflecting warm earth tones for transportation theme, define spacing and typography scales optimized for booking forms and price displays, and configure theme extensions for consistent visual design across components

Create layout component that provides consistent page structure with transportation-themed header displaying the hero banner image from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png, applies global styling, and wraps page content with consistent spacing and navigation patterns
Wrap all routes with the Layout component to ensure consistent transportation-themed visual design across all pages and establish the overall application structure
Wire the generated hero banner image showing modern transportation vehicle on a road with warm sunset lighting into the Layout component as a static asset for the header section
Wire the generated OTP verification icon with shield and checkmark design into the OTPVerificationForm component as a static asset to visually represent the verification step
Wire the generated distance calculation icon with road and distance marker into the TripDetailsForm component as a static asset to visually represent distance input field
